subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — glad the conference connection is leading somewhere productive.

We'd be happy to set up a formal meeting. Here are some available slots:

• April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let us know your preference and we'll get it on the calendar.

Regarding the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we're unable to share internal contact information externally. That said, we'll ensure the right people are looped in as our conversation develops.

Looking forward to it.

Best regards
